subcodes.first_line: O ye blessed souls! The beloved pilgrim like unto an overflowing cup has a heart full of your praises. Continually this Servant expects that all the believers unloose their tongues
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
